ConfigurationHints.LocalSecretsFile: Copy appsettings.local.example.json to appsettings.local.json (gitignored) next to this file.

EnvironmentVariables.ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection: SQL Server connection string (enables EF migrations and dev book endpoints).
EnvironmentVariables.DevData__ExposeEndpoints: true|false — map POST /api/dev/books/* (default false except Development profile).
EnvironmentVariables.DevData__RequireSharedSecret: true|false — require X-Dev-Data-Secret header for dev book endpoints.
EnvironmentVariables.DevData__SharedSecret: Shared secret when RequireSharedSecret is true.
